title: PBS Buffer Solution
author: Dr. Steven Wilhelm

steps_raw.instruction: Add dH 2 O to a clean, acid washed bottle undetermined
Add NaCl undetermined Sodium chloride P212121
Add KCl undetermined Potassium chloride P212121
Add Na 2 HPO 4 undetermined Sodium Phosphate dibasic Fisher Scientific Catalog #S373-500
Add KH 2 PO 4 undetermined Monopotassium phosphate Contributed by users
Adjust the pH to 7.4 using HCl
Add dH 2 O to a total volume of 100 mL
